{"society_power": 8.0, "state_power": 7.5, "society_change": -0.5, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "State of emergency and security-law expansion after terror attacks", "reasoning": "State coercive capacity expanded durably via the \u00e9tat d'urgence, SILT law, and rule-by-ordinance/49.3, while eroding parties and declining unions weakened organized society\u2014only partly offset by new digital and leaderless mobilization (Nuit debout, Gilets Jaunes onset), yielding a modest net decline in society and rise in state."}
